case_title: NOB HILL PLACE PARTNERS, LP VS. MICHAEL POLAKOF ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-27-2021 CONTINUED TO MAR-10-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO VACATE JUDGMENT AND NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, AND ENTER JUDGMENT WITHIN LIMITED JURISDICTIONAL AMOUNT
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAR-10-2021 CONTINUED TO MAY-12-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NOB HILL PLACE PARTNERS, LP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT POLAKOF, MICHAEL $25,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $895.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $25,895.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 66558819) (TRANSACTION ID # 66558819)
